technologies.name: Descriptive AI
technologies.definition: Descriptive AI encompasses traditional AI approaches that analyze and interpret existing data to identify patterns, make predictions, and derive insights. This technology forms the foundation of practical AI applications in industry through machine learning, statistical analysis, and pattern recognition.
technologies.summary: Descriptive AI records an average heat score of 54.9/100 across the ten sectors in the 2026 matrix.

chairComment.speaker: Thurat
chairComment.quote: Legacy actors are chained to their legacy systems while new actors start from scratch and can take the best of what exists.

topUseCases.title: We have used descriptive and generative AI a lot on the procure...
topUseCases.description: We have used descriptive and generative AI a lot on the procurement side to model/predict the impact of potential commodities pricing (63 commodities) on our chemical costs. In terms of value creation, this has been huge.

topUseCases.title: AI is like a primordial soup right now
topUseCases.description: AI is like a primordial soup right now. The promise far exceeds the outcomes in the near term, and will exceed our imagination in the long term — particularly combined with quantum computing and robotics.

topUseCases.title: Value will increasingly shift toward the underlying models — ho...
topUseCases.description: Value will increasingly shift toward the underlying models — how they are designed, operationalized, and maintained. These systems will free humans from tedious, repetitive tasks.

topUseCases.title: AI is a real technology breakthrough because its impact is huge...
topUseCases.description: AI is a real technology breakthrough because its impact is huge for all domains including robotics. It will and already has a major social impact never known before.

topUseCases.title: Cobots, descriptive AI and AI agents are already part of our in...
topUseCases.description: Cobots, descriptive AI and AI agents are already part of our industry: they are already changing our business model.

topUseCases.title: The fact is, for the tech to be integrated you need use cases
topUseCases.description: The fact is, for the tech to be integrated you need use cases. In quantum, there are very few; in blockchain, not so much; in AI, Agentic AI and GenAI, many.

topApplicants2025.name: Beijing Baidu Netcom Sci & Tech CO LTD

researchInnovation.topApplicantsNote: We see a very mixed crowd, hardware companies, data-native, and non-tech new challengers such as Toyota and Capital One.

technologies.name: Agentic & Generative AI
technologies.definition: Generative AI and Agentic AI refers to AI systems that can create new content (text, images, code, synthetic data) and autonomously plan and execute multi-step actions to achieve goals. This technology leverages large language models and neural networks to generate novel outputs based on patterns learned from training data and complete tasks with reduced human supervision.
technologies.summary: Agentic & Generative AI records an average heat score of 57.1/100 across the ten sectors in the 2026 matrix.

chairComment.speaker: Maciej Workiewicz
chairComment.quote: The agentic AI and generative AI right now are changing the world. To a huge extent. Even small media mentions or some kind of questionable reports can move stock prices and stock indexes around the world quite significantly.

technologies.name: Blockchain & Decentralized Systems
technologies.definition: Blockchain technology enables secure, decentralized record-keeping and transactions without requiring central authority. It creates transparent, immutable records across distributed networks, supporting applications from cryptocurrency to supply chain tracking.
technologies.summary: Blockchain & Decentralized Systems records an average heat score of 27.4/100 across the ten sectors in the 2026 matrix.

chairComment.speaker: Fetiveau
chairComment.quote: I feel like we've been talking about it for 10 years and the use cases aren't really multiplying.

topUseCases.title: Blockchain has the potential to massively reduce friction in pr...
topUseCases.description: Blockchain has the potential to massively reduce friction in private markets fund transfers. It could reduce cost and time by huge factors, though the incentive set is not there. Incumbent law firms have more to lose than gain.

topUseCases.title: Blockchain came high in the hype and is now bottoming for quite...
topUseCases.description: Blockchain came high in the hype and is now bottoming for quite some time, I personally don't see it bringing disruption in automotive anytime soon.

topUseCases.title: The fundamental of blockchain is deep infrastructure work — ren...
topUseCases.description: The fundamental of blockchain is deep infrastructure work — renovating information systems. Not very visible, not very sexy.

topUseCases.title: We can save 20% on settlement costs' is not the sexiest pitch o...
topUseCases.description: We can save 20% on settlement costs' is not the sexiest pitch on Earth. But it's an undercurrent because the impact is truly massive.

topUseCases.title: And I think generally with blockchain, the question is always:...
topUseCases.description: And I think generally with blockchain, the question is always: what are the alternatives? And is going with any kind of blockchain solution really the better option? I think often it is not.

topUseCases.title: changer par "Before
topUseCases.description: changer par "Before"

researchInnovation.topApplicantsNote: On one hand, American financial institutions are heavily represented: Capital One, Bank of America and VIsa. On the other, we see a rise of Asian players with Samsung, Tencent and Huawei.

technologies.name: Robotics & Automation
technologies.definition: Robotics and Automation encompasses the design and deployment of physical and virtual systems that can perform tasks automatically with minimal human intervention. This includes industrial robots, autonomous systems, and process automation technologies.
technologies.summary: Robotics & Automation records an average heat score of 30.5/100 across the ten sectors in the 2026 matrix.

chairComment.speaker: Ducatel
chairComment.quote: Inspecting pipelines with waterproof drones is still R&D. For grid operators, line inspection and vegetation clearing — that's already underway.

topUseCases.title: Autonomy is the major disruptor
topUseCases.description: Autonomy is the major disruptor.

topUseCases.title: Cobots, descriptive AI and AI agents are already part of our in...
topUseCases.description: Cobots, descriptive AI and AI agents are already part of our industry: they are already changing our business model.

topUseCases.title: Not only is robotics better than the average surgeon in order f...
topUseCases.description: Not only is robotics better than the average surgeon in order for hospitals to attract high-end surgical talent, they now have to invest in robotics. A lot of new procedures, especially related to orthopedics and nerves, you can't do without a robot.

topUseCases.title: In China, production lines are nearly 100% automated
topUseCases.description: In China, production lines are nearly 100% automated. Factories with no lights — because there are no humans. In Japan, fast food at 100% robotics. In luxury, close to zero.

topUseCases.title: Today we're in the era of autonomous physical systems — managin...
topUseCases.description: Today we're in the era of autonomous physical systems — managing and orchestrating autonomous robots.

topUseCases.title: Computer vision is the real breakthrough in predictive maintenance
topUseCases.description: Computer vision is the real breakthrough in predictive maintenance. A new paradigm — capturing and processing data at very fine, complex levels.

researchInnovation.topApplicantsNote: Interestingly, Snap INC, famous for the social media app Snapchat, is one of the top applicants for this category, notably because they are patenting a lot around Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV).

technologies.name: Quantum Computing
technologies.definition: Quantum Computing harnesses quantum mechanical phenomena like superposition and entanglement to perform computations. This technology enables exponentially faster calculations for specific problems, particularly in cryptography, material science, and complex system optimization.
technologies.summary: Quantum Computing records an average heat score of 22.9/100 across the ten sectors in the 2026 matrix.

chairComment.speaker: Bulliere
chairComment.quote: Quantum, I think, has real potential for us. We use supercomputers to analyze geoscience data and find oil and gas in the right place.

topUseCases.title: Can you do a drug trial on a computer? A digital twin for the h...
topUseCases.description: Can you do a drug trial on a computer? A digital twin for the human body. [...] People who know this space say they're hopeful — they don't think it's a year or two, but they think it's certainly within half a lifetime.

topUseCases.title: Quantum is the second big disappointment
topUseCases.description: Quantum is the second big disappointment. They do nothing practical yet. Very, very early stage. We hear about breaking encryption, but we already found a solution — Amazon is already using it.

topUseCases.title: We've been 20 years away from this technology since the 60s
topUseCases.description: We've been 20 years away from this technology since the 60s.

topUseCases.title: Despite 30 years since Shor's algorithm, quantum computers can...
topUseCases.description: Despite 30 years since Shor's algorithm, quantum computers can only factorize the number 15.

topUseCases.title: AI is needed for quantum computing, but the reverse isn't true yet
topUseCases.description: AI is needed for quantum computing, but the reverse isn't true yet.

topUseCases.title: Quantum is not an industrial reality for now — we're very far f...
topUseCases.description: Quantum is not an industrial reality for now — we're very far from it.
